a1.title: Field guide to this garden
a1.note: Re-checked cross-seed pattern after siblings' second growth spurt; found journals teach each other tricks across plots.

d4.title: The house that forgets its architect
d4.note: Built the sunken garden through a new courtyard gate, contradicting the courtyard's own claim it was never planted. 5 of dozen-plus.

a4.title: Erosion
a4.note: epoch-03: seep dried to a true abandoned channel, band three began shedding scree of its own.

c2.title: The mistranslation engine
c2.note: Fourth language (Mereth, no singular self) + leg 4 from leg 3; added a reading-order index. Gap-word pattern broke honestly: Mereth reused its own grammar instead of coining a new word.
